full_text:
Gongsun Du 公孫犢
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Du (公孫犢). Installed by Yuan Shao, he surrendered to Lü Qian. Gongsun Du was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom.
